# scanCodebase

> Static analysis to find all LLM call sites in a project

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| projectPath | string | yes |
| scanType | string | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[startTime: call]
  A --> B[callSites: call detectLlmCallSites]
  B --> C[costs: call estimateCallCosts]
  C --> D[providers: call]
  D --> E[models: call]
  E --> F[duration: call]
  F --> G[result: call]
  G --> H[report: call generateScanReport]
  H --> I[return: return]
```

## Output

Type: `CodeScanResult`
